name: The Demon's Lantern
description:
Suit Keys (Dex)

Alignment chaotic evil

The Demon's Lantern represents trickery and feats of legerdemain. As long as you have The Demon's Lantern invested, you gain a +2 item bonus to checks made to , , or . This increases to a +3 item bonus if you are at least 17th level.

Activate r envision

Frequency once per day

Trigger A creature hits you with a melee attack

Effect You release a flash of lights and attempt a Reflex saving throw. If your saving throw is higher than the attack roll for the triggering attack, it misses. If the attack misses, the attacker is until the end of your next turn.
